name: USS George W. Ingram (DE 62)
events: 5 Feb 1945 HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN), conducted a deep dive trial in Block Island Sound during which she was escorted by USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR). (1)
10 Feb 1945 USS Cabezon (Cdr. G.W. Lautrup, USN) conducted exercises in Long Island Sound together with USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR).
11 Feb 1945 USS Cabezon (Cdr. G.W. Lautrup, USN) conducted exercises in Long Island Sound together with USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR).
12 Feb 1945 USS Cabezon (Cdr. G.W. Lautrup, USN) conducted exercises in Long Island Sound together with USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR).
16 Feb 1945 USS Moray (T/Cdr. F.L. Barrows, USN) conducted a deep submergence trial in Long Island Sound. She was escorted by USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR)
18 Feb 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises in Long Island Sound together with USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR).
19 Feb 1945 USS Capitaine (Lt.Cdr. E.S. Friedrick, USN) conducted exercises in Long Island Sound together with USS George W. Ingram (Lt.Cdr. A.S. Boyce, USNR).
